name: Firecrawl

composio_registry_match.name: Firecrawl
composio_registry_match.description: Firecrawl automates web crawling and data extraction, enabling organizations to gather content, index sites, and gain insights from online sources at scale

description: A web scraping and data extraction service that transforms websites into clean, LLM-ready markdown or structured data for AI agents.
notes: The API surface is focused on specific agentic tasks (scrape, crawl, map, interact) which is effectively broad for the purpose of agent tooling. Official MCP support is explicitly mentioned in the documentation.
